context: The audit is complete. We have identified all brand contamination and atomic violations. Your mission is to execute the Master Implementation Plan documented in .plans/execute_by_jules.md. This is the single source of truth for all changes.
execution_rules: You MUST follow the sequence of Chunks 1 through 13 as outlined in the plan.
Verify development server stability after EVERY chunk.
Commit each chunk individually with a descriptive message.
Do NOT deviate from the architectural decisions (Section 3 and 9 of the plan).
If you encounter a blocker, document it and stop.
expected_outcome: A 100% brand-neutral, atomic-compliant e-commerce engine ready for multi-tenant deployment.
